item.title: ` mirch::check_page_state` panics
item.body:

comments.body:
This is because [`EarlyFrameAllocator::alloc`](https://github.com/KMiri-rs/asterinas/blob/afb751a4bb7231146b5a735a51eb35bbd81f11d7/ostd/src/mm/frame/allocator.rs#L324) calls [`kern_miri_alloc_pages`](https://github.com/KMiri-rs/asterinas/blob/afb751a4bb7231146b5a735a51eb35bbd81f11d7/ostd/src/arch/miri/mod.rs#L54-L59) which requires the starting allocated addr and page count, while the passed arguments are the `addr ✖ PAGE_SIZE` and total byte size.

The fix should be

```diff
-crate::arch::kern_miri_alloc_pages(allocated * PAGE_SIZE, size)
+crate::arch::kern_miri_alloc_pages(allocated, size / PAGE_SIZE)
```
